title: Charter: Fiber And FWA Won't Kill Cable
text: Like many Covid-profiteers Charter has been a profitable short for the past two years. In addition, at first sight, operational trends are looking bad, while competition seems to be gaining share. In this article, based on a thorough analysis of operational trends, I show why longs should not worry.

title: Charter Loses Customers in Its Dispute With Disney and Shares Plunge
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) shares fell over 9% Friday after the cable TV provider reported in its third-quarter earnings release that it credited customers and lost subscribers over a fee dispute with Disney (DIS).

title: Why Charter Communications Stock Plunged Today
text: Charter announced solid earnings but slightly lower-than-expected revenue for its third quarter. The company's internet and mobile segments saw modest growth in customer counts, but it also lost 320,000 residential video customers during the quarter.

title: Charter (CHTR) Q3 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Charter (CHTR) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Beats Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) came out with quarterly earnings of $8.25 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $7.73 per share. This compares to earnings of $7.38 per share a year ago.

title: Charter CEO Calls Disney Carriage Deal “A Significant Step Forward,” But Q3 Video Revenue Falls 9% Due To Distribution Fight And Broadband Results Hit Stock
text: Charter CEO Chris Winfrey said the company's recent Disney carriage fight cost the company 320,000 video customers in the third quarter, but the resulting deal represents “a significant step forward for the video ecosystem.” Speaking during the company's third-quarter earnings call, Winfrey said the agreement showcased “a new hybrid distribution model is good for consumers.

title: Charter Communications misses estimates for broadband customer additions
text: Charter Communications missed market estimates for quarterly broadband customer additions and posted lower free cash flow on Friday, as it grappled with network expansion costs and tough competition in a saturated market.

text: Charter Communications Inc. added fewer internet subscribers than expected in the third quarter, though the company still racked up positive gains on the metric unlike rival Comcast Corp.

title: Charter Announces Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2023.

title: TOM RUTLEDGE TO BECOME BOARD MEMBER EMERITUS, ERIC ZINTERHOFER APPOINTED NON-EXECUTIVE CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD, CHRIS WINFREY APPOINTED TO CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS' BOARD
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) (along with its subsidiaries, "Charter") today announced that Tom Rutledge will continue to serve the company as a Board Member Emeritus upon his previously announced retirement from the Charter Board of Directors as Executive Chairman on November 30, 2023.

title: Charter Communications: Long Road Of Internet Growth Ahead
text: Charter Communications has experienced revenue growth of 5% per year since its merger with Time Warner in 2017. The slowdown in growth is due to factors such as the pull forward of demand during COVID, increased competition from fiber and fixed wireless, and a low market activity environment. Despite these challenges, Charter expects growth to accelerate in the latter half of 2023 and beyond, driven by investments in the network, strong demand for Spectrum One, and the rural expansion initiative.

title: 3 Stocks to Avoid This Week
text: There are near-term concerns for Altria, Southwest, and Charter Communications this week. Altria's chunky yield defies its potentially troublesome near-term challenges.

title: Charter: Pivot To Mobile Is A Master Stroke
text: Charter Communications celebrates its 30th anniversary as the second largest cable operator in the US. The company has evolved through mergers and acquisitions and bounced back following a bankruptcy filing in 2009. Charter is expanding its broadband and mobile services, with a focus on bundling and cross-selling to drive adoption.

title: Pros Vs. Cons - Why I'm Passing On Charter Communications
text: Charter Communications has been a solid wealth generator with a strong business portfolio and strategic management. Recent negotiations with Disney signal Charter's adaptability to the evolving media landscape in the cable TV industry. The company is focusing on broadband expansion, rural initiatives, and innovative products to position itself for future growth.

title: Warren Buffett Relies On 8 Stocks Now That Apple Is Crumbling
text: Warren Buffett's big-time faith in Apple is hurting Berkshire Hathaway now. Good thing he's got some other S&P 500 winners to count on.

title: Charter Communications and Sercomm Lead the Way in Sustainable Connectivity at SCTE Cable-Tec Expo
text: DENVER, Oct. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Sercomm, a leading network equipment and wireless solutions provider is teaming up with Charter Communications, a leading broadband connectivity company, to demonstrate sustainability leadership at the SCTE Cable-Tec Expo 2023. Charter Communications will unveil its ground-breaking 'Design for Reuse' product series at its exhibition booth E4.

title: Charter Communications Forges Partnership with Precision Optical Technologies to Advance Distributed Access Architectures
text: ROCHESTER, N.Y. , Oct. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Precision Optical Technologies, Inc., a recognized leader in optical networking technologies, proudly announces its multi-year strategic partnership with Charter Communications, Inc. This partnership supports a pivotal moment in Charter's evolution of next-generation broadband services.

title: CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS NAMES JAMAL HAUGHTON EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT, GENERAL COUNSEL AND CORPORATE SECRETARY
text: STAMFORD, Conn., Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) today announced that Jamal Haughton, a veteran legal executive, has been named Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary, effective November 6.

title: S&P 500 Logs Worst Month of 2023: 5 Stocks Still Up in ETF
text: The S&P 500 witnessed its worst month of 2023, losing 5% in September. Fears of higher rates for a longer-than-expected period took the sheen away from stocks in the month.
